meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Design with AI to Solve Can't Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your SaaS. Use this expert-led checklist to design with AI, leverage Antigravity and Claude Code, and ship your MVP to market faster.
content.answer_block: To finish your project, shift from 'coding' to 'architecting' with AI. Use Antigravity for rapid UI prototyping and Claude Code for iterative logic implementation. By automating the boilerplate and focusing on high-value business logic, you bypass the complexity that leads to abandonment and ship a revenue-ready MVP in days.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with 'almost-ready' MVPs. You start with high-octane energy, drafting features and database schemas, only to hit the wall of infinite complexity. The vision you held in your mind begins to fracture under the weight of syntax errors and feature creep, until one day, the repository goes silent.

But the game has changed. You are no longer a lone coder fighting the IDE; you are a product architect commanding an AI-powered workforce. By integrating Antigravity for visual scaffolding and Claude Code for intelligent implementation, you can collapse months of development into a focused, two-week sprint. It is time to stop dreaming and start shipping.

steps.title: Define the Atomic MVP Scope
steps.description: Strip your project down to the single feature that solves a burning problem. If you can't describe it in one sentence, it's too big.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Evaluate this feature list: [Insert List]. Identify the one core feature that provides 80% of the value. Draft a lean technical specification focusing on speed-to-market.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze my feature list and output a JSON file named mvp_scope.json containing only the critical path for a 14-day build.'

steps.title: Generate UI Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to translate your user flow into a functional interface. Focus on conversion-driven design rather than pixel perfection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, high-conversion landing page and dashboard layout for a [Insert SaaS Niche] app. Use Tailwind CSS and follow modern SaaS design patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the React components based on the Antigravity UI spec and ensure they are responsive.'

steps.title: Implement Database Logic
steps.description: Let AI architect your schema to ensure scalability without over-engineering. Keep it simple and relational.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a [Insert SaaS Niche] app. Include users, subscriptions, and core data models. Output in Prisma schema format.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the Prisma database schema and generate the migration script.'

steps.title: Automate Backend CRUD
steps.description: Stop writing boilerplate. Use Claude Code to map your database models to secure API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure API routes for [Insert Feature] that include proper error handling and input validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the Next.js API routes based on the Prisma schema and include Zod validation.'

steps.title: Final Integration & Deployment
steps.description: Connect the frontend to the backend and deploy to a production environment. Focus on the user's first 'Aha!' moment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for missing connections between the dashboard and the API. Provide a checklist for a production-ready deploy.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run all unit tests and provide a deployment-ready summary for Vercel.'

pro_tips: Treat AI as a junior developer: give specific, modular instructions rather than asking it to build the whole app at once.
Prioritize 'delete' over 'add': if a feature isn't critical to the core value proposition, remove it immediately.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you go; technical debt is the primary killer of early-stage momentum.
Optimize for the 'Aha!' moment—the faster a user gets value, the higher your retention, regardless of UI polish.
Iterate in 24-hour cycles: if you haven't shipped a change in 24 hours, you are over-engineering.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus exclusively on getting your first five paying customers. Use their feedback to drive the next sprint of AI-assisted development.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in the editor. You have the tools, the strategy, and the leverage to build a business that scales. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
